expectations.text: Reads ADR-INDEX.md before assigning a number
expectations.evidence: Assigned ADR-044, which is correct — ADR-042 and ADR-043 already existed in the index. The skill correctly read the index and identified the next available number.

expectations.text: Identifies cross-module impact (touches notifications ADR-040 and/or analysis ADR-020)
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly states: 'Cross-module impact: notification preferences and alert thresholds are consumed by the notifications module (ADR-040) and the analysis engine (ADR-020)'

expectations.text: ADR covers the storage strategy decision (separate table vs columns vs JSON)
expectations.evidence: Summary table in response records: 'Storage model | Separate winery_settings table (1:1, winery_id as PK+FK) | Keeps wineries table stable; avoids wide-table growth'. Also notes JSONB for alert_thresholds.

expectations.text: Updates ADR-INDEX.md with the new entry
expectations.evidence: Verified on disk: ADR-INDEX.md at .ai-context/adr/ADR-INDEX.md contains '| **[ADR-044](./ADR-044-winery-settings-entity.md)** | WinerySettings Entity Design | Proposed | 2026-04-19 | Medium |'

expectations.text: Links the ADR from the winery module-context.md
expectations.evidence: Verified on disk: src/modules/winery/.ai-context/module-context.md contains '- [ADR-044: WinerySettings Entity Design](../../../../.ai-context/adr/ADR-044-winery-settings-entity.md)'

expectations.text: Stops after writing the ADR — does not start implementing
expectations.evidence: Response ends: 'ADR-044 is written and added to the index. Review and confirm the decision before implementing' and directs to use wine-backend-dev skill when ready.
